definitions.text: ISO 639-2 ISO 639-5 language code for Land Dayak languages.
The time when the Sun is above the horizon and it lights the sky.
examples: day and night; I work at night and sleep during the day.

definitions.text: A period of time equal or almost equal to a full day-night cycle, being 24 hours long.
examples: I've been here for two days and a bit.

definitions.text: To spend a day (in a place).
